recommendation.title: Rest day — Week 1 starts Monday
recommendation.reasoning: Tomorrow falls 2 days before Week 1 (July 6, corrected — it is a real Monday, not the 7th). TSB is -6.5, mild residual load from the block since June 26, well above the -15 caution line. Sleep was excellent: 9.4h, score 95. Resting HR (42bpm) sits right at your baseline (~43bpm) — no elevation. HRV is 65ms vs a 68ms baseline (-4%, balanced) — no cause for concern. Priority for these last two days is arriving at Monday's swim class fresh.
recommendation.sessionDetail: Optional 20-30 min very easy jog (HR < 140) or full rest — your choice. No targets, no intensity. The pre-plan window is about arriving ready, not adding fitness.
recommendation.bikeNote: Bike both ways is fine — pure zone 1 commute load, won't interfere with the rest window.
recommendation.swimNote: No pool session until Monday's Week 1 swim class (July 6).
